product.description: Golden opportunities await as you enjoy a special moment worth cherishing with the superior quality of Nescafe Gold Blend, our flavour-rich and aromatic coffee.

metaData.Key Information: Blended arabica and a handful of robusta beans together for a rich, yet smooth and rounded taste, and then golden roast them to reveal the gentle caramel flavours and bring out the distinctive, sophisticated aroma. Made by some of the world’s premier coffee experts, Nescafe Gold Blend is much more than a great tasting coffee. It’s a superior, premium coffee that has raised the bar in coffee quality over the last 50 years.

product.description: Our experts have carefully crafted a quality coffee experience that has been a huge favourite for decades. Made by some of the world’s premier coffee experts, it is much more than a great tasting coffee. It is a superior, premium coffee that has raised the bar in coffee quality over the last 50 years.

metaData.Key Information: Nescafe carefully designed glass jar with its aroma-lock lid keeps your Nescafe Gold Blend full of flavour to the last drop. Arabica and a handful of robusta beans are blended together for a rich, yet smooth and rounded taste. The beans are golden roasted to reveal the gentle caramel flavours and bring out the distinctive, sophisticated aroma. Golden opportunities await as coffee lovers enjoy a special moment worth cherishing with the superior quality, flavour-rich and aromatic coffee.

metaData.Storage Information: After opening, close the lid and store in a cool, dry place
